## TDD & Verification

- [ ] CHK001 Tests were written before implementation and failed for the expected reason
- [ ] CHK002 Unit tests cover the feature's business rules and components
- [ ] CHK003 Integration tests cover Firebase, APIs, services, or rules touched by the feature
- [ ] CHK004 E2E tests cover critical mobile flows when applicable

## Security & Privacy

- [ ] CHK005 Server-side validation, authorization, sanitization, and abuse protection are present
- [ ] CHK006 Firebase Security Rules use least privilege and are tested
- [ ] CHK007 No secrets are exposed to frontend code or documentation
- [ ] CHK008 Personal data collection is minimized and documented

## Product & UX

- [ ] CHK009 Feature keeps own-product e-commerce/catalog scope unless marketplace scope was approved
- [ ] CHK010 Mobile-first layout, touch targets, and checkout/search/filter usability are verified
- [ ] CHK011 Accessibility requirements are checked for affected flows
- [ ] CHK012 Performance and SEO requirements are checked for affected pages

## Documentation & Governance

- [ ] CHK013 README.md was reviewed and updated if behavior changed
- [ ] CHK014 Relevant docs/ files were updated
- [ ] CHK015 Skills used, reasons, evidence, and impact are recorded
- [ ] CHK016 Final summary includes checks, risks, files changed, suggested commit, and asks before commit

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
